calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Cindy Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Robert A. Imhoff, who was not present at today's hearing.
Paul Franza, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Christian Colburn, but defendant Tessa Hetrick did appear in pro per and was placed under oath.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 21, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Robert A. Imhoff, and against defendants Christian Colbern and Tessa Hetrick as follows:

Plaintiff Robert A. Imhoff shall recover from defendants Christian Colbern and Tessa Hetrick Past Due Rent in the amount of $1,450.00, Holdover Damages in the amount of $1,788.31 and costs in the amount of $410.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $3,648.31.

Plaintiff Robert A. Imhoff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2911 Sixteenth Street, #312, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Continued To Aug-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, July 30, 2008: Cindy Lee, counsel for plaintiff Robert A. Imhoff; Paul Franza, representative appearing on behalf of plaintiff

No appearance by defendant Tessa Hetrick. Settlement conference off calendar. The August 4, 2008 trial date remains.

Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
